description: Add feature flags (env-based) and wire them to frontend navigation + route guards.
steps: Define feature flags in frontend config (e.g., FEATURE_GRADES, FEATURE_REPORTS, FEATURE_MESSAGING, FEATURE_COURSES, FEATURE_MONITOR).
Hide sidebar/nav entries when flags are off.
Block direct route access with a simple 'Coming soon' or redirect when a flag is off.

description: Enforce hard business rules: students must belong to groups; attendance is group-scoped; grades are group-scoped.
steps: Student create/edit UI requires group selection and sends group_id to API.
Attendance marking requires group filter and uses group_id in payload.
Grades create/edit requires group context and API payload includes group_id.
Backend validates required group_id and rejects missing values.

description: Dashboard KPIs use real data (no mock counts).
steps: Wire dashboard KPI cards to GET /teachers/dashboard.
Remove hardcoded KPI numbers.
UI still loads even if API is empty (safe empty state).

description: WhatsApp setup + status screen is production-ready.
steps: Show pairing/status, QR, and connected state clearly.
Provide actionable error states (no session, disconnected, retry).
Block other features if WhatsApp is not paired (guardrail).

description: Onboarding guardrails: require at least one group before attendance/grades; require WhatsApp setup before messaging/broadcast.
steps: If no groups exist, redirect to group setup and show a clear banner.
If WhatsApp not paired, block messaging/broadcast actions and show setup CTA.
Guardrails work for both admin and teacher roles.

description: Parent WhatsApp replies: simple intent handling for attendance + group queries.
steps: Implement minimal intent detection for: 'Did my son attend?' and 'Which group is he in?'.
Return accurate replies based on attendance + group enrollment.
Fallback response for unknown intents.

description: Broadcast messages to parents by group.
steps: Backend endpoint to send message to all parents in a group.
Frontend action to trigger broadcast from group context.
Basic success/fail feedback in UI.

description: Kill demo debt in production surfaces (hide or remove static demo pages).
steps: Courses/Schedule/Reports/Monitor/Messaging pages are hidden behind flags or show 'Coming soon'.
No demo charts or placeholder KPIs shown to real users.
README updated to reflect MVP scope.
Align frontend grades UI with API response shape or extend API to return needed fields.
Grades create/edit works end-to-end.
Parents can query grade info via WhatsApp (if enabled).

description: Messaging UI connects to real conversations.
steps: Wire conversations list to /whatsapp/conversations.
Wire messages view to /messages/conversations/:id.
Remove mock data from messaging UI.

description: Dashboard KPIs expanded with real metrics (attendance %, counts, message stats).
steps: Use /teachers/dashboard and /messages/stats where relevant.
Display KPI cards with real values.
No charts required.
Enable reports page behind a flag.
Show minimal summaries (attendance by group, grade averages).
Export not required yet.
Define multi-teacher access rules.
Add UI to switch between teachers/centers.
Update queries to respect selected scope.

description: Analytics dashboards and advanced stats aggregation.
steps: Aggregate stats across groups and teachers.
Show analytics dashboard (charts optional).
Document metrics definitions.
Add richer intents and scheduled messages.
Provide admin controls for automation rules.
Guardrails for opt-out and message limits.
Add phase breakdown (v1.0, v1.1, v1.2, v2.0) to README.
Mark which features are MVP vs later.
Keep the list short and sales-ready.
